title: [Deprecated] ExCap
description: Expanding upon Epic Fight with Extendable Weapon Capabilities.
body:
Note: This will break with custom player-made data packs. The only reason to use data packs is for ExCap integration with other modded weapons. This mod requires the Open Beta of Epic Fight which can be gotten at their official Discord.

Why fight over capability space when you can extend?

This mod adds the notable Extendable Weapon Capability from Epic Fight - Battle Arts. This library is free for everyone to add their own Epic Fight movesets. 

I've created this as part of a larger Epic Fighting Forward project, a mini-mod pack project featuring some of my mods to teach aspiring Epic Fight addon developers to develop their movesets.



This is required for Epic Fight - Battle Arts to function.



Currently, the weapons available to patch are.

Axes

Bows

Sword

Longsword

Greatsword

Spear

Dagger

Tachi

Bokken

Uchigatana
